# omada_wlan_group (Resource)

Manages a WLAN group (a named set of SSIDs) on the Omada controller.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "omada_wlan_group" "iot" {
  name = "IoT"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Group name.

### Optional

- `site` (String) Site name. Defaults to the primary site. Changing forces replacement.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `primary` (Boolean) Whether this is the site's primary WLAN group.
- `site_id` (String)
